title: What's Your Money Archetype?

results.title: The Steward
results.description: You have a healthy, balanced relationship with money. You save consistently, track your spending, and feel in control of your finances. You see money as a tool for both security and purpose, neither obsessing over it nor avoiding it. Your thoughtful approach positions you well for long-term financial stability.

results.title: The Mogul
results.description: You're ambitious and goal-oriented when it comes to wealth. You track your finances closely and feel motivated by financial growth and achievement. While your drive is a strength, watch for the stress that can come with always pushing for more. Channel your energy into goals that align with your values.

results.title: The Monk
results.description: You're not primarily motivated by money, and that's a valid choice. However, some financial structure can reduce stress and give you more freedom to pursue what truly matters. You don't need to become obsessed with wealth, but a basic plan can help you feel more secure.

results.title: The Avoider
results.description: You're struggling with financial stress because you're not engaging with your money. Avoidance often makes anxiety worse. The good news: taking even small steps — like tracking spending for one month or creating a basic budget — can dramatically reduce your stress and give you back a sense of control.

description: Discover your natural relationship with money and finances. This quiz reveals whether you're a Steward, Avoider, Monk, or Mogul — and what that means for your financial wellbeing.
